languages.text: "Оставайтесь на Гордости Сантиэля и молите Императора о прощении".

traits.locale_text: "Оставайтесь на Гордости Сантиэля и молите Императора о прощении".

languages.text: "Stay on Santiel's Pride and beg the Emperor for forgiveness."
languages.original_text: "Оставайтесь на Гордости Сантиэля и молите Императора о прощении".

languages.text: "Bleibt auf Santiels Stolz und bittet den Kaiser um Vergebung."
languages.original_text: "Stay on Santiel's Pride and beg the Emperor for forgiveness."

languages.text: "Restez sur la Fierté de Santiel et suppliez l'Empereur de vous pardonner."
languages.original_text: "Stay on Santiel's Pride and beg the Emperor for forgiveness."

languages.text: "留在桑提尔的荣耀上，向皇帝陛下乞求宽恕"
languages.original_text: "Stay on Santiel's Pride and beg the Emperor for forgiveness."

languages.text: "Quédate en el Orgullo de Santiel y pide perdón al Emperador".
languages.original_text: "Stay on Santiel's Pride and beg the Emperor for forgiveness."

languages.text: "サンティエルのプライドにとどまり、皇帝に許しを請う"
languages.original_text: "Stay on Santiel's Pride and beg the Emperor for forgiveness."

languages.text: "Santiel'in Gururu'nda kalın ve İmparator'dan af dileyin."
languages.original_text: "Stay on Santiel's Pride and beg the Emperor for forgiveness."
